features: Package Included: 2PCS in one package. Each piece about 48 gram. You can easy to replace.
Material: Heat-resistant synthetic fiber, soft touch, natural glossy, just like human hair, straight fashion style for women.
Easy To Use: Messy hair bun scrunchies for women, perfect for adding volume to messy elegant looking. Simply tie your own hair into a ponytail or a bun, use the wrap like a scrunchy.

Fashion Style Recommend: Style one(1): You can use one piece as curly messy hair bun. Style two(2): You can also use 2 pieces at one time if you want much thick hair looking. Style three(3): You can use 2 pieces as two horns style, cute and elegant.

Occasions: Hair extension pieces for women suitable for women. The Curly Messy Hair Bun Wrap Scrunchies Elastic Hair Band is great daily life, outdoor, matched with your daily dress up, take part in wedding, music festivals, appointment, Christmas party, Halloween costume and cosplay for fun.
